rulesStrings.li: ntkcube_scene->The [cubeWork] [cubeDepicts] [aCube]. A [ntkmeme_race] [PersonJob] is holding up the cube to [aPawn], saying: "Congratulations, father, you can now proclaim yourself emperor!"
ntkcube_scene->The [cubeWork] [cubeDepicts] a [ntkmeme_race], their face showing [ntkmeme_emotional_expression_strong], roaring: "The cube was mine to begin with — MINE!"

ntkcube_scene->The [cubeWork] [cubeDepicts] several [PersonJob]s [ntkmeme_dialogue]. [side_position] is inscribed: "This [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] has strange tastes — she has always seen young girls as wilted flowers, yet views the cube as a beautiful woman."

ntkcube_scene->The [cubeWork] [cubeDepicts] a [ntkmeme_race] in a vehicle, holding [aCube] in their hand, [ntkmeme_dialogue] to those nearby: "[ntkmeme_faction] is a wasteland now, a useless thing — the cube is the true treasure among treasures!"

ntkcube_scene->The [cubeWork] [cubeDepicts] two [ntkmeme_race]. One shouts angrily: "I see you can't bear to part with this cube!" Then, with [AdjectiveBadass] fury, they flip the cube away. [side_position], a subordinate rushes to pick up the cube, but is stopped by the other: "What are you picking it up for? If you pick it up today, he'll come back and cause trouble again tomorrow!"
